title: Healer

theology: The song forms doxology and wonder, echoing biblical worship that magnifies the name of the Lord and His greatness. It cultivates reverence and joyful praise in response to God’s majesty.
practical_worship_leadership: Great as a strong mid-set lift. Keep the tempo steady and the chorus big. If your room is new to it, repeat the chorus early so it becomes familiar quickly.

title: I Am Not Alone
summary: A comforting worship song that reminds believers God is with them, offering courage and peace for fearful or lonely seasons.
theology: The song forms assurance of God’s presence, aligning with Scripture’s promises that God is with His people and strengthens them. It can be framed pastorally as truth for suffering and anxiety.
practical_worship_leadership: Lead it pastorally and let the room sing the chorus clearly. Keep dynamics supportive and avoid overbuilding too early. Strong for ministry moments and prayer nights.
